attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.MESSAGE_3B2_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PO_CURRENCY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FREIGHT_CARRIER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FREIGHT_CHARGES, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FREIGHT_CURRENCY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FREIGHT_TERMS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PICK_SLIP_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PO_RELEASE_NO, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.BOL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIP_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIP_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIP_VIA, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIPMENT_NOTE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SHIPMENT_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.WAREHOUSE_LOCATION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PARTNER_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.B2B_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.R12_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SJ_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ACK_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FUNC_ACK_CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.FUNC_ACK_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.EMAIL_NOTIFICATION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.TRANSMISSION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ORGANIZATION_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.LPN_PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.VALIDATION_SUCCESS_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.DROP_SHIP_LOCATION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE,
(
 select MESSAGE_3B2_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE
 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B2_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B2_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.MESSAGE_3B2_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_ASNHDR_IB_IFACE)
